checks.name: owner_view_safety
checks.description: ViewDocument for User principals is only allowed if: owner, in viewACL, or publicAccess is view/edit

checks.name: public_view_safety
checks.description: ViewDocument for Public principals is only allowed if publicAccess is view or edit, and shares not expired

checks.name: modify_safety
checks.description: ModifyDocument is only allowed if owner or in modifyACL or publicAccess==edit, not locked, respecting expiry

checks.name: delete_safety
checks.description: DeleteDocument only allowed if owner or in manageACL (with expiry constraint for non-owners)

checks.name: add_to_share_acl_safety
checks.description: AddToShareACL only allowed if owner or in manageACL (with expiry constraint for non-owners)

checks.name: edit_is_private_safety
checks.description: EditIsPrivate only allowed if owner or in manageACL (with expiry constraint for non-owners)

checks.name: edit_public_access_safety
checks.description: EditPublicAccess only allowed if owner or in manageACL (with expiry constraint for non-owners)

checks.name: auth_deny_view
checks.description: Unauthenticated User principals cannot ViewDocument

checks.name: auth_deny_modify
checks.description: Unauthenticated User principals cannot ModifyDocument

checks.name: block_deny_view
checks.description: Blocked users (bidirectional) cannot ViewDocument

checks.name: block_deny_modify
checks.description: Blocked users (bidirectional) cannot ModifyDocument

checks.name: lock_deny_modify
checks.description: ModifyDocument is forbidden when document is locked, even for owner

checks.name: delete_group_safety
checks.description: DeleteGroup only allowed if principal is owner of the group and authenticated

checks.name: modify_group_safety
checks.description: ModifyGroup only allowed if principal is owner of the group and authenticated

checks.name: owner_view_floor
checks.description: Owner MUST be able to ViewDocument when authenticated, not blocked, and shares not expired (or owner exempt from expiry)

checks.name: owner_delete_floor
checks.description: Owner MUST be able to DeleteDocument when authenticated

checks.name: owner_modify_floor
checks.description: Owner MUST be able to ModifyDocument when authenticated, not blocked, and document not locked

checks.name: view_acl_floor
checks.description: User in viewACL MUST be able to ViewDocument when authenticated, not blocked, shares not expired

checks.name: modify_acl_floor
checks.description: User in modifyACL MUST be able to ModifyDocument when authenticated, not blocked, shares not expired, not locked

checks.name: manage_acl_add_share_floor
checks.description: User in manageACL MUST be able to AddToShareACL when authenticated, shares not expired

checks.name: group_owner_delete_floor
checks.description: Group owner MUST be able to DeleteGroup when authenticated

checks.name: public_view_floor
checks.description: Public principal MUST be able to ViewDocument when publicAccess==view and shares not expired

checks.name: liveness_view_document
checks.description: ViewDocument for User is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_modify_document
checks.description: ModifyDocument is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_delete_document
checks.description: DeleteDocument is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_create_document
checks.description: CreateDocument is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_delete_group
checks.description: DeleteGroup is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_public_view
checks.description: ViewDocument for Public principal is not trivially deny-all

results.description: ViewDocument for User principals is only allowed if: owner, in viewACL, or publicAccess is view/edit
ViewDocument for Public principals is only allowed if publicAccess is view or edit, and shares not expired
ModifyDocument is only allowed if owner or in modifyACL or publicAccess==edit, not locked, respecting expiry
DeleteDocument only allowed if owner or in manageACL (with expiry constraint for non-owners)
AddToShareACL only allowed if owner or in manageACL (with expiry constraint for non-owners)
EditIsPrivate only allowed if owner or in manageACL (with expiry constraint for non-owners)
EditPublicAccess only allowed if owner or in manageACL (with expiry constraint for non-owners)
Unauthenticated User principals cannot ViewDocument
Unauthenticated User principals cannot ModifyDocument
Blocked users (bidirectional) cannot ViewDocument
Blocked users (bidirectional) cannot ModifyDocument
ModifyDocument is forbidden when document is locked, even for owner
DeleteGroup only allowed if principal is owner of the group and authenticated
ModifyGroup only allowed if principal is owner of the group and authenticated
Owner MUST be able to ViewDocument when authenticated, not blocked, and shares not expired (or owner exempt from expiry)
Owner MUST be able to DeleteDocument when authenticated
Owner MUST be able to ModifyDocument when authenticated, not blocked, and document not locked
User in viewACL MUST be able to ViewDocument when authenticated, not blocked, shares not expired
User in modifyACL MUST be able to ModifyDocument when authenticated, not blocked, shares not expired, not locked
User in manageACL MUST be able to AddToShareACL when authenticated, shares not expired
Group owner MUST be able to DeleteGroup when authenticated
Public principal MUST be able to ViewDocument when publicAccess==view and shares not expired
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: Public::"", action: Action::"ViewDocument", resource: Document::""
context: {is_authenticated: true, requestTime: -1}
entities: [
  Document::"" {
    isLocked: true,
    isPrivate: true,
    manageACL: DocumentShare::"",
    modifyACL: DocumentShare::"A",
    owner: User::"",
    publicAccess: "view",
    shareExpiry: 1,
    viewACL: DocumentShare::"B",
  },
  Action::"AddToShareACL",
  Action::"DeleteDocument",
  Action::"ModifyGroup",
  Action::"EditPublicAccess",
  Public::"",
  Action::"DeleteGroup",
  DocumentShare::"",
  Action::"CreateGroup",
  DocumentShare::"B",
  Group::"" {
    owner: User::"",
  },
  Action::"ViewDocument",
  Action::"CreateDocument",
  Action::"EditIsPrivate",
  User::"" {
    blocked: [],
    personalGroup: Group::"",
  },
  Action::"ModifyDocument",
  DocumentShare::"A",
]

results.description: ViewDocument for User is not trivially deny-all
ModifyDocument is not trivially deny-all
DeleteDocument is not trivially deny-all
CreateDocument is not trivially deny-all
DeleteGroup is not trivially deny-all
ViewDocument for Public principal is not trivially deny-all
results.counterexample: LIVENESS VIOLATION: Policy always denies this action. It must allow at least one scenario.
